message:
feat(demo-showcase): add golden trace corpus for regression gating (bd-lff4p.5.3)

Creates 8 deterministic session traces exercising key demo showcase
rendering paths through SessionRecorder + replay:

- golden_dense_dashboard: dashboard widgets at 80x24 with 5 ticks
- golden_dense_dashboard_large: same at 120x40 (layout variation)
- golden_screen_navigation: Tab through 4 screens + BackTab
- golden_resize_storm: 7 rapid resizes (40x12 → 200x60)
- golden_mouse_interaction: move + click on tab bar and content area
- golden_tick_animation: 15 consecutive ticks for animated content
- golden_keyboard_scrolling: Shakespeare screen with arrow/PageDown
- golden_mixed_workload: combined navigation + resize + mouse + ticks

Each test records a trace, then replays it against a fresh AppModel
verifying all frame checksums match (FNV-1a determinism contract).

Also fixes 2 clippy warnings in ftui-web session_record.rs
(redundant closures in JSONL deserialization).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
